B28_MED_1_skill_index_docs_seed.detail: skill__index_docs in DEFAULT_HOT_LIST_SEED but hot_list_n=10 truncates 12-item seed; items 11-12 (skill__read_local_files, skill__index_docs) never reach LLM tool list. Hallucination rag.operation__create_index persists in S1 and S9.

B28_NEW_2_python_safe.detail: preprocessor_step_completed without permission_denied in S5 and S6. reyn.yaml python.safe:allow confirmed.

B29_eval_audit.detail: skill__skill_improver not observed (disambiguation worked). New variant: skill__direct_llm_eval hallucinated. skill__eval absent from tool list due to hot_list_n=10 cap.

new_bugs.description: hot_list_n=10 default truncates 12-item DEFAULT_HOT_LIST_SEED; skill__read_local_files and skill__index_docs never appear in LLM tool list on cold-start sessions. Also skill__eval not in seed at all.
new_bugs.fix_hint: bump hot_list_n default to >=13 in ActionRetrievalConfig; add skill__eval to DEFAULT_HOT_LIST_SEED
